title: Stemonoporus ceylanicus
taxonomy: Stemonoporus ceylanicus is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae. This classification places it in the order Malvales and the clade rosids. As a member of the family Dipterocarpaceae, it is often referred to as a dipterocarp. The family Dipterocarpaceae is a group of flowering plants commonly found in tropical forests, particularly in Southeast Asia. The classification of Stemonoporus ceylanicus reflects its evolutionary relationships with other dipterocarps.
